1→"""Base class for printing wrapper operations. 2→ 3→This module provides a base class that contains common functionality for 4→printing wrapper implementations, eliminating code duplication across 5→PrintingGit, PrintingGitHub, and PrintingGraphite. 6→""" 7→ 8→from typing import Any 9→ 10→import click 11→ 12→from erk_shared.output.output import machine_output, user_output 13→ 14→ 15→class PrintingBase: 16→ """Base class for printing wrapper implementations. 17→ 18→ Provides common printing infrastructure for delegating operations 19→ while optionally printing styled output for executed commands. 20→ 21→ This base class contains the common initialization and printing methods 22→ that are identical across all Printing wrapper implementations. 23→ """ 24→ 25→ def __init__(self, wrapped: Any, *, script_mode: bool = False, dry_run: bool = False) -> None: 26→ """Create a printing wrapper around an Ops implementation. 27→ 28→ Args: 29→ wrapped: The Ops implementation to wrap 30→ script_mode: True when running in --script mode (output to stderr)
... [30 lines omitted] ...
